item.title: Tasks
item.description: Write showstoppers if too little people liked a solution What needs to be decided Would you use it on a PC? If mixed opinion then, we have to decide.

item.title: What to ask of everyone that I show the site to
item.description: Filll in forms.gle/4vDL6JpMRu6TzWT89 Get the contact of everyone Add in a structure list (Name - potential use) .

item.title: Erasmus university
item.description: Project Overview Project Scope Main Goal: To collaborate with companies, particularly those with interests in Southeast Asia, to define and execute specific assignments ...

item.title: Dream Big, Fail often, Succeed Anyway
item.description: Mike Verhiel - Innovation manager at KPN Developed Psylaris, with a dream to let go of psychologists. He developed a company that offers a VR set to patients.

item.title: CompetitiveAnalysis
item.description: Define Your Market or Industry Scope: Clearly define the industry or market segment you’re analyzing. For example, if you’re looking at business and university collaborations, specify whether you’re focusing on tech transfer, research partnerships, educational programs, etc.

item.title: Educational process research vs applied science
item.description: Educational Process: Research uni: Focus: These institutions emphasize theoretical and research-oriented education. Students engage deeply with subjects through lectures, reading, and extensive research projects.
